questions.question: What kind of device do I need to get started?
questions.answer: You don’t need a high-end machine. Any decent laptop that can run development tools and a modern browser smoothly will be enough. As a minimum recommendation: 8GB RAM, Intel i5 (6th generation) or Ryzen 5 or higher, and at least 20GB of free storage.

questions.question: Are these fields really in demand in the job market?
questions.answer: Yes. Technology-related fields are among the most in-demand careers today both locally and globally. As companies continue moving toward digital solutions, the need for people with practical technical skills keeps growing.

questions.question: How can I start if I’m completely new?
questions.answer: If you're starting from scratch, you can choose a suitable learning path from the courses page and enroll directly. If you're unsure where to begin, you can take a career path assessment or book a free consultation to help you choose the right track.

questions.question: Do I need any prior experience before enrolling?
questions.answer: No prior experience is required for most programs. Our learning paths are designed to take you step by step from the basics to a level where you can start working and building a real portfolio.
